name: monolegal-challenge
description: Sistema de automatización de notificaciones de facturación - Reto Monolegal

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --prefix apps/api && npm run build --prefix apps/worker && npm run build --prefix apps/frontend
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --prefix packages/shared && npm run build --prefix packages/domain && npm run build --prefix packages/application && npm run build --prefix packages/infrastructure
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix packages/shared && npm run test --prefix packages/domain && npm run test --prefix packages/application
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build && npm test
scripts.seed: npm run build:packages && node scripts/link-workspaces.js && tsx scripts/seed.ts
